name: GH_LooseChunk
summary: A utility class for creating partial archives.

constructors.name: GH_LooseChunk(String)
constructors.summary: Create a new loose chunk. A loose chunk does not have an owner archive and thus cannot store runtime messages.

constructors.name: GH_LooseChunk(String, Int32)
constructors.summary: Create a new loose chunk. A loose chunk does not have an owner archive and thus cannot store runtime messages.

params.name: chunk_index
params.doc: Index of this chunk, negative one for no index.

methods.name: AddComment
methods.signature: public void AddComment(string comment_text)
methods.summary: Adds a text comment to this chunk. Comments are serialized only if the output flavour is a human readable format. Comments are never deserialized, they are purely for the benefit of the humans reading the file data.

params.name: comment_text
params.doc: The content of the comment, text might be altered if it contains invalid characters for a chosen format flavour.

throws.when: Thrown if the content text is either null or empty.

methods.name: AddMessage
methods.signature: public void AddMessage(string m, GH_Message_Type t)
methods.summary: Log a new message with the top-level archive. Messages are collected during read/write operations, and can be displayed to the user upon completion using GH_Archive.ShowMessageLog().

throws.when: Thrown if message text is null or empty.

methods.name: ChunkExists(String)
methods.signature: public bool ChunkExists(string name)
methods.summary: Checks whether a chunk with the specified name exists in the litter. Only chunks without index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to test for.

returns.doc: True if a chunk with the specified name exists, otherwise false.

methods.name: ChunkExists(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool ChunkExists(string name, int index)
methods.summary: Checks whether a chunk with the specified name and index exists in the litter. Only chunks with index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to test for.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of chunk to test for. If less than zero, ChunkExists(string name) is called instead.

returns.doc: True if a chunk with the specified name and index exists, otherwise false.

methods.name: CopyValuesFromChunk
methods.signature: public void CopyValuesFromChunk(GH_Chunk other)
methods.summary: Copy all values and sub-chunks from another chunk.

methods.name: CopyValuesToChunk
methods.signature: public GH_Chunk CopyValuesToChunk()
methods.summary: Copy all values and sub-chunks in this chunk to another chunk which does not point to the same archive.

methods.name: CreateChunk(String)
methods.signature: public GH_IWriter CreateChunk(string chunk_name)
methods.summary: Create a new child chunk with the specified name and without an index qualifier. If another chunk already exists with similar properties, an exception will be thrown.

returns.doc: The newly created child chunk.

throws.when: Thrown if the name+index coordinte is already occupied by another chunk.

methods.name: CreateChunk(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public GH_IWriter CreateChunk(string chunk_name, int chunk_index)
methods.summary: Create a new child chunk with the specified name and index qualifier. If another chunk already exists with similar properties, an exception will be thrown.

returns.doc: The newly created child chunk.

throws.when: Thrown if the name+index coordinte is already occupied by another chunk.

methods.name: Deserialize_Binary
methods.signature: public void Deserialize_Binary(byte[] content)
methods.summary: Deserializes a byte array.

methods.name: Deserialize_Xml
methods.signature: public void Deserialize_Xml(string xml_content)
methods.summary: Deserializes an Xml string.

methods.name: FindChunk(String)
methods.signature: public GH_IReader FindChunk(string name)
methods.summary: Finds the first chunk in the litter that matches the given name. Only chunks without index qualifiers are considered.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to search for.

returns.doc: The child chunk that matches the given name, or null of no matching chunk could be found.

methods.name: FindChunk(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public GH_IReader FindChunk(string name, int index)
methods.summary: Finds the first chunk in the list that matches the given name and index. Only chunks with index qualifiers are considered.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to search for.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of chunk to search for. If less than zero, FindChunk(string chunk_name) is called instead.

returns.doc: The child chunk that matches the given name and index, or null of no matching chunk could be found.

methods.name: FindItem(String)
methods.signature: public GH_Item FindItem(string name)
methods.summary: Finds the first item that matches the given name. Only items without index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of item to search for.

returns.doc: The item that matches the given name, or null of no matching item could be found.

methods.name: FindItem(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public GH_Item FindItem(string name, int index)
methods.summary: Finds the first item that matches the given name and index. Only items with index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of item to search for.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of item to search for. If less than zero, then FindItem(string name) is called instead.

returns.doc: The item that matches the given name and index, or null of no matching item could be found.

methods.name: GetBoolean(String)
methods.signature: public bool GetBoolean(string item_name)
methods.summary: Gets the value of the item with the specified name. Name comparison is not case-sensitive.

returns.doc: The inner value of the item.

throws.when: Thrown if the type conversion fails.
Thrown if the type conversion is invalid.
Thrown if the item with the specified name does not exist.

methods.signature: public bool GetBoolean(string item_name, int item_index)

throws.when: Thrown if the type conversion fails.
Thrown if the type conversion is invalid.
Thrown if the item with the specified name and index does not exist.

methods.name: GetPath(String, String)
methods.signature: public string[] GetPath(string item_name, string basePath)
methods.summary: Gets the value of the item with the specified name. Name comparison is not case-sensitive.

params.name: basePath
params.doc: Base path for relative path resolution.

returns.doc: An array of path strings. If the resolved relative path is different from the stored absolute path, an array of two strings will be returned [absolute, relative].

throws.when: Thrown if the type conversion fails.
Thrown if the type conversion is invalid.
Thrown if the item with the specified name does not exist.

methods.name: ItemExists(String)
methods.signature: public bool ItemExists(string name)
methods.summary: Gets the occupancy for a specific item name. Only items without index qualifiers are considered.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of item to check for.

returns.doc: True if an item with a similar name already exists, false if not.

methods.name: ItemExists(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool ItemExists(string name, int index)
methods.summary: Checks whether an item with the specified name and index exists. Only items with index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of item to test for.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of item to test for. If index is less than zero, then ItemExists(string name) is called instead.

returns.doc: True if an item with the specified name and index exists, otherwise false.

methods.name: Read(BinaryReader)

methods.summary: Read this chunk and all child chunks from a binary stream.

params.name: reader
params.doc: The Binary reader to use, cannot be null.

methods.name: Read(XmlNode)
methods.signature: public void Read(XmlNode node)
methods.summary: Read this chunk and all child chunks from an Xml node.

params.name: node
params.doc: The Xml node to deserialize from, cannot be null.

methods.name: RemoveChunk(GH_IChunk)
methods.signature: public bool RemoveChunk(GH_IChunk chunk)
methods.summary: Remove the specified chunk from the litter.

returns.doc: True is chunk was removed, false if chunk is not part of this litter.

throws.when: Thrown if chunk is a null reference.

methods.name: RemoveChunk(String)
methods.signature: public bool RemoveChunk(string chunk_name)
methods.summary: Remove the first chunk with a matching name. Only chunks without index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

methods.signature: public bool RemoveChunk(string chunk_name, int chunk_index)
methods.summary: Remove the first chunk with a matching name and index. Only chunks with index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

returns.doc: True is chunk was removed, false if no matching chunk could be found.

methods.name: Write(BinaryWriter)
methods.signature: public void Write(BinaryWriter writer)
methods.summary: Write this chunk and all child chunks to a binary stream.

params.name: writer
params.doc: The Binary writer to use, cannot be null.

throws.when: Thrown if the name of this chunk is either null or empty.

methods.name: Write(XmlWriter)
methods.signature: public void Write(XmlWriter writer)
methods.summary: Serialize this chunk into an Xml stream.

throws.when: Thrown if

properties.name: Archive
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the archive that owns the Root of the tree this chunk belongs to.

properties.name: ArchiveLocation
properties.summary: Gets a string representing the URI with which the archive is associated. The location may be a null string.

properties.name: ChunkCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of child chunks contained in this chunk. The set of all child chunks is referred to as a 'litter'.

properties.name: Chunks
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the internal list of child chunks. Do not access this list unless you know what you are doing.

properties.name: HasComments
properties.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether or not comments have been stored in this chunk.

properties.name: HasIndex
properties.summary: Gets the index existence implication. The item is considered to have an index qualifier if the index value is larger than or equal to zero.

properties.name: HasName
properties.summary: Gets the name validity of this item. The item is considered to have an invalid name if string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets the index of this chunk. The index is set by the owner of this chunk. Indices smaller than zero imply no index has been set. The combination of name+index is always unique among a set of chunks in the same litter.

properties.name: ItemCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of items contained in this chunk.

properties.name: Items
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the internal list of items. Do not access this list unless you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets the name of this chunk. The name is set by the owner of this chunk. Names must be at least 1 character long. The combination of name+index is always unique among a set of chunks in a single litter.

properties.name: m_archive
properties.summary: Pointer to the archive that owns the Root of the tree this chunk belongs to.

properties.name: m_chunks
properties.summary: Dictionary of sub-chunks contained within this chunk.

properties.name: m_comments
properties.summary: List of text comments. This list is automatically instantiated once the first comment is added.

properties.name: m_index
properties.summary: Index of this chunk. This field is set only once, during construction. A negative index indicates no index qualifier has been set.

properties.name: m_items
properties.summary: The list of nodes contained within this chunk.

properties.name: m_name
properties.summary: Name of this chunk. This field is set only once, during construction.
